attributes.action: Get Larry should get an order of the British Empire
attributes.additional_details: For over a decade, Larry the Cat has served Downing Street with dedication, becoming a symbol of stability and national morale. Beyond pest control, he has provided continuity through many Prime Ministers and become a beloved part of British culture. This petition calls for an OBE to recognise his long service, public impact, and role in representing British identity.
attributes.background: Award Larry the Cat an OBE for loyal service at Downing Street. For years he has provided stability, boosted national morale, and become a symbol of British identity. His long service and cultural impact deserve formal recognition.
